queue.title: New Game: Gaming Word Scramble
queue.description: Daily game: unscramble a gaming-related word (game titles, characters, studios). Simple, fast, shareable. Fits the competitive daily-game pattern alongside Pixle/RIFT/Gamerdle.

queue.title: New Game: Gaming Trivia Quiz
queue.description: 10-question daily gaming trivia quiz. Multiple choice. Timer per question. Score sharing. Categories: FPS, RPG, Retro, Esports. Grok for question bank.

queue.title: New Game: Typing Speed Test (Gaming Edition)
queue.description: Type gaming-related phrases, quotes, and terms as fast as possible. WPM score, accuracy, shareable result. No install needed. High replay value.

queue.title: New Game: Asteroid Dodge (arcade)
queue.description: Mouse/touch-controlled ship that dodges incoming asteroids. Score increases over time. Leaderboard via localStorage. Fast, addictive, mobile-friendly.

queue.title: Roundup: Best gaming setup under $500
queue.description: High-intent buying guide combining headset+mouse+keyboard+chair picks under $500 total.

queue.title: Roundup: Best gear for competitive FPS
queue.description: Use-case roundup: mice, headset, keyboard, monitor picks optimized for FPS.

queue.title: Internal linking audit + improvements
queue.description: Add cross-links between guide pages and versus pages. Every guide should link to its relevant versus comparisons.
